description:
Implement `hx-image` (T3 tier) — 1/6 libraries ship this. Accessible image wrapper with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio control.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-image.ts`, `hx-image.styles.ts`, `hx-image.stories.ts`, `hx-image.test.ts`

**Props:** `src` (string), `alt` (string — required for non-decorative), `width` (number|string), `height` (number|string), `loading` (`lazy`|`eager`, default `lazy`), `fit` (`contain`|`cover`|`fill`|`none`|`scale-down`), `ratio` (string — CSS aspect-ratio like "16/9" or "1"), `rounded` (boolean|string — border-radius), `fallback-src` (string — shown on error)

**Slots:** `fallback` (custom error/loading state)

**Events:** `hx-load`, `hx-error`

**CSS Parts:** `base` (img element)

**ARIA:** When `alt` is empty string: `role="presentation"`. When `alt` provided: normal ``. Host element should NOT duplicate the alt via aria-label. The inner `` handles all semantics.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (load, error/fallback, alt handling), axe-core zero violations (both decorative and informative modes), Storybook all fit modes + aspect ratios, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-image — T3 Accessible Image Component
